mapper.insert: INSERT INTO maummcc.LEARNING_MODEL (LEARNING_ID, REG_ID, REG_DT, MOD_ID, MOD_DT, LEARN_NAME, RESULT_CODE, RESULT_MSG, CREATE_DTM, HDQR_BOB_DCD, EPOCH, LEARNING_RATE, BATCH_SIZE, LEARNING_TYPE) VALUES (#{dataId}, #{regId}, current_timestamp(), #{modId}, current_timestamp(), #{learnName}, '0', 'SUCCESS', current_timestamp(), #{hdqrBobDcd}, #{epoch}, #{learningRate}, #{batchSize}, #{learningType});
mapper.select: SELECT lm.ID, lm.LEARNING_ID, lm.REG_ID, lm.REG_DT, lm.MOD_ID, lm.MOD_DT, lm.LEARN_NAME, lm.RESULT_CODE, lm.RESULT_MSG, lm.CREATE_DTM, lm.HDQR_BOB_DCD, lm.EPOCH, lm.LEARNING_RATE, lm.BATCH_SIZE, lm.DEPLOY_STATUS, lm.LEARNING_TYPE, lm.FILE_PATH, lm.FILE_NAME, ld.DATA_NAME, ld.SELECT_CON, ld.START_DT, ld.END_DT FROM LEARNING_MODEL lm LEFT JOIN LEARNING_DATA ld ON lm.LEARNING_ID = ld.ID WHERE lm.ID = #{id}

select lm.ID, lm.LEARNING_ID, lm.HDQR_BOB_DCD, lm.REG_ID, lm.REG_DT, lm.MOD_ID, lm.MOD_DT, lm.LEARN_NAME, lm.RESULT_CODE, lm.RESULT_MSG, lm.CREATE_DTM, lm.EPOCH, lm.LEARNING_RATE, lm.BATCH_SIZE, lm.DEPLOY_DT, lm.DEPLOY_STOP_DT, lm.LEARNING_RESULT, lm.DEPLOY_STATUS, lm.LEARNING_TYPE, lm.BDGT_ITEX_FRCS_CON_PRECISION, lm.BDGT_ITEX_FRCS_CON_RECALL, lm.BDGT_ITEX_FRCS_CON_F1_SCORE, lm.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON_PRECISION, lm.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON_RECALL, lm.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON_F1_SCORE, lm.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_CON_PRECISION, lm.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_CON_RECALL, lm.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_CON_F1_SCORE, lm.BDGT_EXNS_PAMT_MCD_PRECISION, lm.BDGT_EXNS_PAMT_MCD_RECALL, lm.BDGT_EXNS_PAMT_MCD_F1_SCORE, lm.ACIM_CON_PRECISION, lm.ACIM_CON_RECALL, lm.ACIM_CON_F1_SCORE, hm.MEM_NAME as REG_NAME from LEARNING_MODEL lm inner join HC_MEMBER hm on lm.REG_ID = hm.MEM_ID
ORDER BY CREATE_DTM
ASC
DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) from LEARNING_MODEL lm inner join HC_MEMBER hm on lm.REG_ID = hm.MEM_ID

select count(*) from LEARNING_MODEL lm where lm.DELETE_YN = 'N' and lm.LEARNING_ID in
#{item}
select count(*) from LEARNING_MODEL lm where lm.LEARN_NAME = #{learnName}
mapper.update:
update LEARNING_MODEL lm set lm.DELETE_YN = 'Y', lm.MOD_ID = #{memId}, lm.MOD_DT = current_timestamp() where lm.ID in
#{item}

update LEARNING_MODEL lm set LEARNING_ID = null where lm.LEARNING_ID in
#{item}
